title: Templates and Checklists. From Trello to Monday

posts.author: Layasamadhi (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I’m evaluating the transfer but I don’t understand if there is a fundamental feature. The item template.

My team and I have many card templates in Trello, each with their own checklist. At the moment I haven’t found a way with Monday. Is it possible? Otherwise, I can’t move because it’s too important a part of our workflow.
